scopes.purchased: Access a member's Vimeo On Demand purchase history.
scopes.create: Create new Vimeo resources like showcases, groups, channels, and portfolios. To create new videos, you need the upload scope.
scopes.edit: Edit existing Vimeo resources, including videos.
scopes.delete: Delete existing Vimeo resources, including videos.
scopes.interact: Interact with Vimeo resources, such as liking a video or following a member.
scopes.promo_codes: Add, remove, and review Vimeo On Demand promotions.
scopes.video_files: Access video files belonging to members with Vimeo Pro membership or higher.

name.label: Name
name.description: Optional name to identify this auth.

_scopes.label: Scopes
_scopes.description: The scopes this auth has access to.

_oauth.description: Connect to a Vimeo Account and grant the required scope access to our Auth App, you can revoke those anytime.

custom_info.description: Use a Custom App to make the authentication with.
